compiled_state.author: Joe Oakhart
compiled_state.description:
## Why
The epic 88ab feature-branch flow (S3) replicates refs/heads/feature/** (all nesting depths) to the GitHub mirror so g2p's workflow_dispatch(ref=refs/heads/feature/<name>) resolves. Side effect: test.yml, eval.yml, optionality.yml all trigger on push: branches: ['**'], so every replicated feature/* branch-head push fans out 3 extra CI runs on the mirror. These runs cast NO Verified vote (gerrit-verify workflow_dispatch is the sole Verified source), so they are pure cost/noise, not part of the gate.

## What
- Scope feature/** OUT of the push triggers of test.yml, eval.yml, optionality.yml (e.g. push: branches-ignore: ['feature/**'], preserving main + pull_request), so replicated feature branches do not trigger redundant mirror CI.
- Verify the gerrit-verify (Verified) path is unaffected.

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] test/eval/optionality no longer run on pushes to refs/heads/feature/** (all nesting depths) on the mirror — evidence: after the change lands + replicates, push a test feature/<x> branch head and confirm the GitHub Actions run list shows zero push-triggered test/eval/optionality runs for it (gh run list --branch feature/<x>)
- [ ] main + PR triggers unchanged; gerrit-verify Verified path unaffected
- [ ] A feature/** branch push produces zero push-triggered mirror runs (evidence)

file_impact.reason: scope feature/** out of push trigger

scope feature/** out of push trigger

compiled_state.title: Scope feature/** out of push-triggered mirror workflows (test/eval/optionality) — avoid CI fan-out from feature-branch replication
